action.hypothesis: Matched architecture probe: keeping K=128, EXPANSION_FACTOR=2, OPTIMIZER=signum, and LR=3.0e-3 fixed, the asymmetric two-stage soft-codebook residual variant may improve FVU at essentially unchanged encoder/runtime cost by front-loading more of the sparse budget into the first residual refinement stage. Final reconstruction formula: x_hat = U(Vx) + Σ_m pi_m c_m + Σ_i alpha_i^(1) b_i + Σ_j alpha_j^(2) b_j, with stage1_k≈0.75K and stage2_k≈0.25K. This is LUTurbo 扩展兼容 because trunk/codebook/residual branches all decode from static vector libraries and the final output is still a finite weighted sum over static libraries.
action.summary: Run one matched architecture probe with ARCHITECTURE=lowrank_asymmetric_two_stage_soft_codebook_residual while keeping K=128, EF=2, signum, and LR=3.0e-3 fixed. It is LUTurbo 扩展兼容 with reconstruction x_hat = U(Vx) + Σ_m pi_m c_m + Σ_i alpha_i^(1) b_i + Σ_j alpha_j^(2) b_j, and it is the nearest feasible architecture variant to the current mainline without adding extra encoder-cost/routing overhead.
action.self_review: This is a strict single-variable architecture probe and respects the round policy. The main risk is prior negative history for the asymmetric family, but those results were in higher-EF regimes; here the low-EF regime shift and identical cost envelope make one final matched check defensible. I am intentionally not probing routed or bucketed two-stage soft-codebook variants because their EF=2 encoder selection cost is already over budget (~2.5x original matmul) and would be policy-blocked.
notes_to_memory: Compatibility: 扩展兼容. Export path remains low-rank trunk library + soft codebook library + residual dictionary library; no dynamic decoder components.

Cost check: at K=128, EF=2 this family stays on the same encoder-cost class as the current mainline and remains feasible under the 1.5x selection-cost hard cap, unlike routed/bucketed two-stage soft-codebook variants.

Probe choice rationale: this is the closest architecture-only perturbation to the current mainline that preserves deployment form and should not introduce the substantial throughput slowdown seen with more expensive selector variants.
next_hypotheses: After this single probe, return to the mainline lowrank_two_stage_soft_codebook_residual path regardless of outcome, per policy.
If this probe underperforms again at EF=2, treat the asymmetric budget split as not worth continuing in the low-EF compatible regime.
